caption.full:
Alex and Ani releases new 'Twilight' jewelry collection

The new Alex and Ani collection is inspired by Stephenie Meyer's 'Twilight' saga. Pieces feature iconic quotes and character designs, with some items already selling out.

Which piece from the new Twilight collection is your favorite?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#Twilight #AlexAndAni #MovieMerch #Jewelry
caption.firstComment: I’m still deciding between the Spider Monkey Locket Necklace and the Bella & Edward cuff — which quote or design speaks to you most?

facebook.text: Alex and Ani has released a new jewelry collection inspired by the Twilight saga. The Spider Monkey Locket Necklace is engraved with the quote 'You better hold on tight spider monkey,' and some items have already sold out. Which piece is your favorite?

youtube.title: Alex and Ani's Twilight Collection Sells Out
youtube.description:
Alex and Ani launched a new jewelry collection inspired by Stephenie Meyer's 'Twilight' saga on July 17. The collection features items like the Spider Monkey Locket Necklace and a Jacob Pendant Necklace. Some pieces have already begun selling out.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/movies/alex-and-ani-launches-new-twilight-jewelry-collection/

#AlexAndAni #Twilight #StephenieMeyer #Bella #Edward #Shorts
